verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From a world, a world of sin and shame Jesus brought me out And into the light I came; Showed me truth so I'll not be deceived, His Word I believe, Now I live to lift His name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For Jesus all He's all that I have to live for And even though His way seem hard sometime The end's eternal life, So I live for Jesus Christ So I live for Jesus Christ.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I hold close the opportunity That's been given me To serve the Lord in my day Tell me what could be a greater privilege than to serve God in this age To walk in His provided way

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We can't live in a world of fantasy Of worldy thoughts and dreams They will fade away so fast But this truth, this Word that sets us free is the only reality It is the only thing that always shall last.
